title: Minimize Real Multiplications for a Small Bilinear DFT-Core Tensor
strategies: trivial: one bilinear multiplication per nonzero (i,j) support cell (= baseline rank)
greedy: mode-1 slice rank factorization (fewer products when slices are low rank)
strong: best of mode-1/mode-2/mode-3 exact rank factorizations
open: search for an overcomplete rank-R bilinear algorithm below any single-mode bound
